title: refactor: remove virtual-root path convention from LocalFilesystem

similarOrDuplicatePRs.title: fix(core): prevent tilde paths from nesting under basePath in contained LocalFilesystem
similarOrDuplicatePRs.relationship: predecessor - fixed a related path-nesting bug that motivated this broader refactor

summary: Removes the virtual-root path convention from LocalFilesystem where absolute paths like '/file.txt' were silently mapped to 'basePath/file.txt' in contained mode. Now absolute paths are treated as real filesystem paths (subject to containment checks), and relative paths resolve against basePath. Changes span 5 source files (local-filesystem.ts, composite-filesystem.ts, glob.ts, tree-formatter.ts, workspace.ts), 19 test files updated to use relative paths, 1 doc file, 1 playground-ui component, and 2 changesets. The author reports all 1395 tests pass locally.
maintainerNotes: PR is still in draft. CI has 4 failing checks (Agent Builder, Core e2e, Observability, Full Test Suite) but all failures appear unrelated to this PR — they involve API call errors (ENOTFOUND internal-llm.enterprise.com), agent-not-found errors, and observability tracing test issues. Two reviewers have left comments: TylerBarnes questioned the composite-filesystem '.' normalization logic (CalebBarnes responded explaining the difference for composite FS), and LekoArts requested splitting the changeset so playground-ui gets a separate description. The playground-ui changeset has been split out (.changeset/no-virtual-root-playground.md). This follows PR #13741 which fixed a related tilde-path nesting bug. The refactor is well-scoped to a single concern with thorough test coverage updates.
